LanguageData.DW_Catachan_CombatBlade_III.label: Catachan Mk III Combat Blade
LanguageData.DW_Catachan_CombatBlade_III.description: They say a Catachan Jungle Fighter can take down a full-grown Cudbear with one of these knives.
LanguageData.DW_Catachan_Sword_I.label: Catachan Sword Mk I
LanguageData.DW_Catachan_Sword_I.description: The Catachans refer to these massive blades as knives. To everyone else, they're hefty swords.
LanguageData.DW_Catachan_Sword_I.tools.0.label: Light attack
LanguageData.DW_Rashad_CombatAxe.label: Rashad Mk II Combat Axe
LanguageData.DW_Rashad_CombatAxe.description: Rashad Mk II Combat Axe from Warhammer 40K: Darktide.
LanguageData.DW_Rashad_CombatAxe.tools.0.label: Light attack
LanguageData.DW_Duelling_Sword_IV.label: Maccabian Mk IV Duelling Sword
LanguageData.DW_Duelling_Sword_IV.description: Maccabian swords are renowned for their light weight, keen edge and ostentatious detailing.
LanguageData.DW_Duelling_Sword_IV.tools.0.label: light
LanguageData.DW_Duelling_Sword_IV.tools.1.label: stab
